recommendations.title: Bullyparade: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A multi-episode movie based on the skit TV show "bullyparade".

recommendations.title: Wickie the Mighty Viking
recommendations.overview: One morning our little Viking village of Flake is raided by frightening looking spooky demons who kidnap all the children… except for Wickie, who was stuck in a tree trying to use a kite to learn to fly.

recommendations.title: Manitou's Canoe

recommendations.title: Manitou's Shoe

recommendations.title: Lissi and the Wild Emperor
recommendations.overview: The plot concerns a yeti who makes a pact with the devil to kidnap the most beautiful girl in the world. This turns out to be the Princess Lissi, who is clearly the Austrian Princess and later Empress Elisabeth of Bavaria, and much of the film is tak

recommendations.title: The Chipmunk Adventure
recommendations.overview: The Chipmunks and the Chipettes go head to head in a hot air balloon race, and the winner gets $100,000. Unbeknownst to the participants, the "race" is actually a diamond smuggling ring!

recommendations.title: Society of the Snow
recommendations.overview: On October 13, 1972, Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571, chartered to take a rugby team to Chile, crashes into a glacier in the heart of the Andes.

recommendations.title: The Red Balloon
recommendations.overview: A young boy discovers a stray balloon, which seems to have a mind of its own, on the streets of Paris. The two become inseparable, yet the world’s harsh realities finally interfere.

recommendations.title: Turbulence
